summary: V53.1 useAudioVisualizer Hook Integration Test - PASSED. Verified the new audio-visual bridge hook that connects MixerContext's AnalyserNode to ParticleField. All 10 mixer tabs work correctly. ParticleField renders in Orbit panel with audioData prop. Frequency playback (528Hz) + Orbit panel shows no console errors. Multi-route regression passed on /breathing, /meditation, /oracle, /frequencies.
critical_code_review_comments: useAudioVisualizer hook correctly reads from MixerContext's analyserRef and ctxRef
ParticleField properly receives optional audioData prop and falls back to ChaosEngine-only behavior when no audio
Provider nesting is correct: MixerProvider (audio) wraps SystemMixerProvider (console) in App.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: V53.1 useAudioVisualizer integration verified. The hook at /app/frontend/src/hooks/useAudioVisualizer.js bridges MixerContext's AnalyserNode to ParticleField. Audio data (amplitude, frequency, transients) drives particle behavior when audio is playing. When no audio is active, ParticleField falls back to ChaosEngine-only behavior. Provider nesting: MixerProvider (audio context) → SystemMixerProvider (console context) → children. Login flow works but Account panel may show 'Cosmic Traveler' even after login - this is existing behavior, not a regression.
